creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm trying to update some of my rack / net drawings with graphics/py-nwdiag but it seems py-pillow/py-imaging/pkg has something against that :(

If I call nwdiag/rackdiag with debug mode 

# rackdiag --debug -T png -o rackXX.png rackXX.diag
Traceback (most recent call last):
..
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/PIL/ImageFont.py", line 44, in __getattr__
    raise ImportError("The _imagingft C module is not installed")
ImportError: The _imagingft C module is not installed

# grep -R _imagingft /usr/ports/
/usr/ports/graphics/py-imaging/files/patch-_imagingft.c:--- ...


OK remove py-pillow and try with py-imaging instead.

# make install -C /usr/ports/graphics/py-imaging/
# rackdiag --debug -T png -o rackXX.png rackXX.diag
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/rackdiag", line 5, in <module>
    from pkg_resources import load_entry_point
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources.py", line 2876, in <module>
    working_set = WorkingSet._build_master()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources.py", line 449, in _build_master
    ws.require(__requires__)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources.py", line 745, in require
    needed = self.resolve(parse_requirements(requirements))
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources.py", line 639, in resolve
    raise DistributionNotFound(req)
pkg_resources.DistributionNotFound: Pillow


I'm out of ideas since py-imaging has marked py-pillow as confict :( and If I remove the CONFLICT line pkg want let me allow to install each other.

===>   Registering installation for py27-imaging-1.1.7_5
Installing py27-imaging-1.1.7_5...
pkg-static: py27-imaging-1.1.7_5 conflicts with py27-pillow-2.6.0_1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/pilconvert.py-2.7
*** Error code 70
